name: Baked Apples
recipeIngredient: 1 large Washed apple, top and core removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Sprinkle the inside of the apple with sugar and cinnamon.
3. Place the apple in a baking dish with a few spoonfuls of water at the bottom.
4. Bake until tender, about 30-45 minutes.
(NOTE: This is a good dessert for the whole family. Adults can sprinkle nuts on top of their portions).
